case_title: BRITTANI PLUMMER VS. WINELUV, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION, ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLUMMER, BRITTANI AS TO DEFENDANT WINELUV, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION, DBA HAUNTED HOUSE OF HORRORS DONOVAN, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA HAUNTED HOUSE OF HORRORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
